evidence.description: The pilot explicitly labels builder-authored task and artifact conventions as unvalidated hypotheses.
limitations: No production incident, user report, or expert testimony is represented.

evidence.description: One retained public-skill attempt completed under the recorded component versions.
limitations: One arm and one attempt establish neither paired effect nor broad task validity.

evidence.description: Synthetic values exercise stable-repeat and invalidity gates.
limitations: Values are builder-authored contract calibration, not observed repeat performance or independence evidence.

evidence.description: A synthetic saturation flag tests that saturation cannot independently license graduation.
limitations: This is not observed capability saturation.

evidence.description: The synthetic owner declares a narrow regression consequence for contract testing.
limitations: No production owner, professional consequence, or deployment decision is represented.

evidence.description: Builder-authored marker stands in for positive and negative trigger cases at schema calibration time.
limitations: No actual contrast-set execution or trigger accuracy claim is made.

evidence.description: A planted grader-defect scenario exercises immutable replacement and old-score preservation.
limitations: It does not assert that grader-v1 has a real defect or grader-v2 corrects behavior.

origin.selection_note: Pilot and health fixture predate any valid matched effect estimate.

operational_roles.intended_use: Candidate execution probe only; current unmatched run cannot estimate capability.
Exercise a valid transition shape without making an empirical health claim.

contrast_set.trigger_or_boundary: Evidence row with valid ID and compatible scope should be accepted.
Unknown or scope-broadened evidence should be rejected.

replication_policy.replicate_grouping: Group by exact task, grader, harness, environment, and configured-system versions.
replication_policy.seed_policy: Record each attempt seed or explicitly mark provider seed unavailable.
replication_policy.environment_reset: Fresh task-scoped filesystem for each attempt.
replication_policy.environment_fingerprint: Hash launcher, allowlist, task inputs, harness, and environment interface.
independence_threats: Shared authored fixture and grader assumptions

health_evidence.interpretation: Accepted only inside this schema fixture; no empirical stability claim.
Synthetic zero invalid count exercises the gate.
The planted defect is resolved by versioning for contract purposes only.
No human labels or grader-human agreement study exists.
Saturation is explicitly insufficient by itself.
No production or authentic usage distribution exists.
No expert-approved safety, compliance, or critical-trap coverage exists.

transitions.rationale: Exercise evidence requirements for role graduation while retaining all empirical claim gates.
transitions.regression_consequence: Alert on changed outcomes for the exact pinned synthetic fixture contract; do not infer professional regression.

revisions.reason: Planted grader-defect adjudication for lifecycle contract testing.

retirement.reason: Synthetic fixture remains useful for contract tests.
retirement.critical_coverage_disposition: Unknown; no critical professional coverage is claimed.
retirement.comparability_decision: Retain exact-version history and require a bridge for any new instrument.

task_health_records.claim_boundary: This package proves schema and semantic-validator behavior only. It does not establish task health, agent capability, treatment effect, grader accuracy, expert validity, production relevance, or release readiness.
